<tr>
<td>--made-color-action-background-on-dark-active</td>
<td>Deprecated: This token is deprecated as 'on-dark' tokens are no longer in use. Please see MADE CSS migration notes on alternative code for UI elements on dark backgrounds. </td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>--made-color-action-background-on-dark-default</td>
<td>In Made CSS 3.0 this is only being used in the context of a primary button</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>--made-color-action-background-on-dark-hover</td>
<td>In Made CSS 3.0 this is only being used in the context of a primary button</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>--made-color-action-border-on-dark-active</td>
<td>Deprecated: This token is deprecated as 'on-dark' tokens are no longer in use. Please see MADE CSS migration notes on alternative code for UI elements on dark backgrounds.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>--made-color-action-border-on-dark-default</td>
<td>This token in Made 3.0 CSS is used for both primary and secondary button border colors on dark. In Unify, we have separate tokens for those properties. Primary button --made-component-button-primary-default-border-color-mode-dark Secondary button --made-component-button-secondary-default.border-color-mode-dark</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>--made-color-action-border-on-dark-hover</td>
<td>This token in Made 3.0 CSS is used for both primary and secondary button border colors on dark. In Unify, we have separate tokens for those properties. Primary button --made-component-button-primary-default-border-color-mode-dark Secondary button --made-component-button-secondary-default.border-color-mode-dark</td>
</tr>

</tr>
<tr>
<td>--made-color-action-disabled-toggle</td>
<td>DEPRECATED. We have approached disabled colors differently in Unify. This requires guidance for teams using Web B2B. Teams will need to create their own component level token for disabled button/toggle/text input color to achieve B2Bs style</td>

<td>--made-font-body-family-bold</td>
<td>Deprecated: This token is specific in Mastercard Mark for MC font. We have deprecated this token to support multiple themes. We recommend replacing this token with `--made-font-family-primary` and `--made-font-weight-bold`</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>--made-font-family-bold</td>
<td>Deprecated: This token is specific in Mastercard Mark for MC font. We have deprecated this token to support multiple themes. We recommend replacing this token with `--made-font-family-primary` and `--made-font-weight-bold`</td>
</tr>
